title: hieracium apricorum subsp. subpallescens
intro: Hieracium apricorum subsp. subpallescens, also known as a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium apricorum subsp. subpallescens include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice for its medicinal and topical applications.
